workoutPlans.planName: HealthPulse AI BEGINNER MUSCLE GAIN Plan

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.description: Keep chest up, push hips back as if sitting in a chair, ensure knees align with toes.

exercises.name: Knee Push-ups (or regular)
exercises.description: Hands slightly wider than shoulders, lower chest towards floor, keep body in a straight line from knees/feet to head.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunges
exercises.description: Step back with one leg, lower hips until both knees are bent at 90 degrees, keep front knee over ankle.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.description: Keep body in a straight line from head to heels, engage core, don't let hips sag or rise too high.

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
exercises.description: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat. Lift hips off floor by squeezing glutes, creating a straight line from shoulders to knees.

exercises.name: Crunches
exercises.description: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat. Lift head and shoulders off floor, engaging abs, don't pull on neck.

exercises.name: Incline Push-ups
exercises.description: Place hands on an elevated surface (wall, sturdy bench), body straight, lower chest to surface.

exercises.name: Sumo Squats
exercises.description: Feet wider than shoulder-width, toes pointed out. Lower hips, keeping chest up, knees track over toes.

exercises.name: Bird-Dog
exercises.description: Start on all fours. Extend opposite arm and leg straight out, keeping core tight and back flat.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.description: Stand tall, slowly rise onto the balls of your feet, hold briefly at the top, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Superman
exercises.description: Lie face down, arms and legs extended. Lift chest, arms, and legs off the floor simultaneously, squeezing lower back and glutes.

exercises.name: Leg Raises
exercises.description: Lie on back, hands under lower back for support (optional). Keep legs straight, slowly lift to 90 degrees, then lower without touching the floor.

exercises.name: Pike Push-ups
exercises.description: Start in an inverted V-shape with hips high. Bend elbows and lower head towards the floor between your hands, targeting shoulders.

exercises.name: Step-ups
exercises.description: Use a sturdy chair or step. Step up with one leg, pushing through the heel, bring the other foot up, then step back down.

exercises.name: Wall Sit
exercises.description: Lean against a wall, slide down until knees are at 90 degrees, thighs parallel to the floor, hold this position.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.description: Start in a plank position. Bring one knee towards your chest, then switch quickly, maintaining a strong core.

exercises.name: Russian Twists
exercises.description: Sit on floor, knees bent, feet flat (lift feet for challenge). Lean back slightly, twist torso side to side, touching hands to the floor.

exercises.name: Chair Dips (Modified)
exercises.description: Sit on edge of sturdy chair, hands beside hips. Slide hips off, bend elbows to lower body, then push back up. Keep feet closer to make it easier.

workoutPlans.planName: HealthPulse AI BEGINNER WEIGHT LOSS Plan

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.description: Keep your chest up, sit back into your hips, and push your knees outward as you lower down.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Ups
exercises.description: Place hands on an elevated surface like a sturdy bench or wall. Keep your body in a straight line as you lower your chest.

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
exercises.description: Land softly on the balls of your feet and maintain a steady, rhythmic breathing pattern.

exercises.name: Plank Hold
exercises.description: Engage your core, squeeze your glutes, and ensure your body forms a straight line from head to heels.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunges
exercises.description: Step backward, lowering your hips until your back knee is just above the floor. Keep front knee behind your toes.

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Drive through your heels to lift your hips, squeezing your glutes at the top.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.description: From a plank position, drive your knees toward your chest alternately at a controlled, brisk pace.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.description: On hands and knees, reach opposite arm forward and opposite leg backward. Keep your hips level and spine neutral.

exercises.name: Sumo Squats
exercises.description: Take a wide stance with toes pointed outward. Lower your hips while keeping your torso as upright as possible.

exercises.name: Prone Y-T-W Extensions
exercises.description: Lie face down and raise your arms to form the letters Y, T, and W to target your upper back muscles.

exercises.name: High Knees (Low Impact)
exercises.description: March in place, bringing your knees up to hip height. Pump your arms to keep your heart rate up.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.description: Lie on your back, press your lower back firmly into the floor, and slowly lower opposite arm and leg.

meals.name: Oatmeal with Berries and Nuts
meals.recipe: Combine oats and water/milk in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until liquid is absorbed. Pour into a bowl, top with mixed berries, walnuts, and a drizzle of honey.

meals.name: Turkey and Hummus Wrap with Baby Carrots
meals.recipe: Lay the tortilla flat. Spread hummus evenly over the tortilla, leaving a small border. Layer turkey, lettuce, and tomato over the hummus. Roll the tortilla tightly. Serve with baby carrots on the side.

meals.name: Baked Salmon with Roasted Sweet Potato and Green Beans
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
meals.recipe: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Wash and peel the sweet potato, then cut into 1-inch cubes. Trim the ends of the green beans. In a bowl, toss sweet potato and green beans with 1/2 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Spread them on a baking sheet. Place the salmon fillet on the same baking sheet, drizzle with remaining 1/2 tbsp olive oil, and season with salt and pepper. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until salmon is cooked through and vegetables are tender. Serve with a lemon wedge.
